name: Shrimp, Chicken, and Pinapple Kebabs
recipeInstructions:
Jalepeno baste: Seed and coarsely chop 2 jalepeno peppers. Saute in oil until soft, and add 1 heaping tablespoon of sugar. Puree. Add a little oil if the mixture seems too thick.
Cut chicken into 3/4 inch chunks. Peel and core pineapple and cut into chunks.
Combine Jalepeno baste with lemon juice and heat through.
Thread the shrimp, the chicken, and the pineapple, alternating them, onto skewers. Brush with the Jalepeno mixture, sprinkle with salt and pepper, and grill for 6 - 7 minutes over glowing coals until done. Alternatively, broil in the oven or cook for 10 minutes in the Jet-Stream Oven.
